headline: JPMorgan resets UnitedHealth stock target for 2026
summary: As of one year ago, UnitedHealth Group (UNH) was experiencing a severe and volatile downward correction, trading at approximately $300 to $312 per share. headline: Patients Denied Care, Then Approved Later? Federal Watchdog Raises Medicare Advantage Concerns
summary: Federal investigators found Medicare Advantage plans frequently denied requests for nursing and rehabilitation care, with many decisions later overturned on appeal.
